kyc.title:
Let's confirm
it's really you.

kyc.errorSub: Make sure your ID is readable and well-lit, then try again.

checkout.comingSoonToast: Coming soon — pay by card in the meantime.

checkout.openDispute: You can open a dispute from the order while you haven't confirmed delivery.

orders.title: My orders

order.qrInstruction: To release the payment to the seller, scan the QR code on your parcel with the app. This confirms you received the order — the code proves physical handover.
order.receiveCodeBody: Print this code and stick it on the parcel. The buyer scans it upon delivery to confirm and release your payment.
order.confirmOnlyBuyer: Only the buyer of this order can confirm receipt.
order.confirmScanBody: To confirm this order, scan the QR code on the parcel with the app. This proves you received the order.
order.confirmHoldHint: Hold for 5 seconds to confirm. Payment will be released to the seller. This action is final.
order.confirmUnavailableBody: This order isn't waiting for confirmation. Open tracking to see its current status.

dataSaver.title: Data saver
dataSaver.subtitle: Ideal on 3G or a limited plan.

dataSaver.row2Sub: Photos load in standard quality instead of HD.

dataSaver.autoNote: We turn this on automatically when we detect a slow connection, even if you haven't enabled it.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: You decide what Linky can do with your data.
privacy.togglePersonalizeSub: Tailor your Discover feed to your taste.
privacy.toggleAnalyticsSub: Help us improve the app with aggregate stats.
privacy.toggleProfilePublicSub: Other users can see your name and listings.
privacy.downloadSub: Coming soon — for now, email us at support@linky.gn.
privacy.deleteSub: Ask our team to permanently delete your account.
privacy.deleteConfirmBody: We'll open your mail app so you can send a request to our support team. They'll confirm the deletion by return mail.

aboutScreen.tagline: Guinea's marketplace and real estate, in one app. Crafted with care in Conakry.
aboutScreen.shareMessage: Linky — Guinea's marketplace and real estate. Worth a look.

helpScreen.subtitle: We're here to help you use Linky with peace of mind.
helpScreen.statusSub: Check service status in real time.
helpScreen.faq1A: We hold the funds in escrow until the buyer confirms receipt.
helpScreen.faq2Q: What to do in case of a dispute with a seller?
helpScreen.faq2A: Open a dispute from the order. A Linky mediator steps in within 48 hours.
helpScreen.faq3Q: How do I become a verified seller?
helpScreen.faq3A: Go to Profile → Identity verification and follow the 3 steps.
helpScreen.faq4A: Yes, with a bank card for the diaspora. GNF remains the main currency.

legal.terms1B: By using Linky, you accept these terms of service. They govern your relationship with Linky SAS, a company under Guinean law.
legal.terms2B: You must be at least 18 years old and provide accurate information. You are responsible for the security of your account and any activity on it.
legal.terms3B: You agree to publish only listings that comply with Guinean law. Linky acts as a technical intermediary and uses escrow to secure payments.
legal.terms4B: Payments are made via Mobile Money or bank card. A commission may apply to transactions, clearly shown before confirmation.
legal.terms5B: If you disagree, you can open a dispute directly in the app. Our mediation team responds within 48 hours to propose a resolution.
legal.terms6B: The following are forbidden: illegal goods, violent or hateful content, counterfeits, weapons, drugs, illegal services. Any non-compliant listing will be removed and the account sanctioned.
legal.terms7B: Linky is not a party to transactions between users. Our liability is limited to providing the platform and mediating disputes.
legal.terms8B: We may change these terms at any time. Substantial changes will be notified to you by email or in-app notification.
legal.terms9B: These terms are governed by Guinean law. Any dispute will be submitted to the competent courts of Conakry.
legal.priv1B: Account information (name, phone, email, photo), location data when you allow it, content you publish (listings, messages, reviews), technical data (device model, OS version) and payment data (encrypted, never stored in plain text).
legal.priv2B: To run the app, secure transactions, personalize your experience (if you allow), prevent fraud, and contact you about important account matters.
legal.priv3B: We never sell your data. We only share it with: technical providers (hosting, payment, SMS), delivery partners when you use them, authorities when the law requires it.
legal.priv4B: You can at any time access your data, modify it, export it, or request its permanent deletion. Go to Profile → Privacy → My data.
legal.priv5B: We keep your data as long as your account is active. After deletion, some information may be kept for up to 3 years to meet our legal and accounting obligations.
legal.priv6B: Your data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Passwords are never stored in plain text. Our servers are hosted in ISO 27001 certified data centers.
legal.priv7B: The app uses technical identifiers to work (session, preferences) and, if you allow, analytics identifiers to understand how Linky is used.
legal.priv8B: Linky is reserved for people 18 and over. If you find that an account belongs to a minor, report it immediately to privacy@linky.gn.
legal.priv9B: Any question about your data: privacy@linky.gn. Our Data Protection Officer answers within 30 days.

roleGate.bodySeller: To access {{surface}}, activate the {{role}} role in your profile. It's free and you can disable it anytime.
roleGate.bodyAgent: To access {{surface}}, activate the {{role}} role in your profile. It's free and you can disable it anytime.
roleGate.bodyBoth: To access {{surface}}, activate the {{seller}} or {{agent}} role in your profile. It's free and you can disable it anytime.
